feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Business Rule Framework (BRFplus)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Business Rule Framework (BRFplus) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BRF+ updates to AMT_DOCCUR aren't reflected in IT_CURRENCYAMOUNT, leading to posting, but unchanged.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Issue with BRF+ Integration in BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST – AMT_DOCCUR Not Updated. 

While integrating BRF+ with the BAPI - BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST, we attempted to modify the local currency amount (AMT_DOCCUR) dynamically using BRF+ rules. The logic was executed successfully, and the modified amount was correctly calculated within the BRF+ expression.

However, the issue arises during data mapping—specifically, when assigning the updated amount to the internal table IT_CURRENCYAMOUNT, which is a mandatory input structure for the BAPI.

Despite the updated value being present in the BRF+ output (e.g., a formula or ruleset), it is not getting transferred or passed into the IT_CURRENCYAMOUNT table during runtime. As a result, the BAPI call proceeds with the original amount (or an empty one), and the posting completes without reflecting the intended amount change.

Please let me know if you need anything else. Thank you so much for your quick response in advance.

Thanks again,

Rachna

entry.title: BRF+ S4/HANA 2025 BADI code ABAP for key users
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I'm implementing the SD_APM_SET_APPROVAL_REASON badi.

When implementing the badi, it tells me that the ABAP model for key users should be used.

For this badi, a BRF was implemented as the decision-making model.

My issue is that when I try to execute the BRF within the badi, I get the following message:

The use of Class CL_FDT_FUNCTION_PROCESS is not permitted.

I've searched some forums, but they refer to the CL_FDT_FUNCTION_PROCESS_API.

But it doesn't exist on my system.

I've also tried generating a class that inherits from CL_FDT_FUNCTION_PROCESS, but it's defined as final, so I can't inherit its properties.

Is there any other way to run the BRF from the ABAP code for key users?

entry.title: Is there a released API/RAP BO/CDS view to read the BRFplus tables/configuration data?
entry.content: Is there a released API/RAP BO/CDS view to read the BRFplus tables/configuration data?

entry.title: Adding a new relationship category to BRF+/OPD?
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm currently working on a BRF+ project, where I'm tasked to edit the "OPD_V3_BILLING_DOCUMENT" to make the Receiver Decision Table include a new result column.

The problem arises when I try to add the new result column, as the Decision Table no longer follows SAP's template, I've tried to change the Result Data Object but that still sends errors:

 

the two errors are APOC_OC_CONFIG0101 and APOC_OC_CONFIG108.

The errors doesn't appear when I create my own Decision Table unless it share its name with one of standard SAP Decision Tables, but that isn't a solution as it then no longer appears in the OPD.

So my question is: How can I create a new Result Column without creating errors? and if that isn't an option, is there a way for me to make a new Decision Table and have that appear in the OPD?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Is BRF+ integrated with SAP Flexible Workflow for dynamic agent determination?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'd like to understand whether SAP Flexible Workflow provides a standard/configurable integration with BRF+ for dynamic agent determination based on business rules, or if the only available approach is to invoke BRF+ through an agent determination BAdI such MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2?

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thanks,
Mustafa.

entry.title: Skip Role Owner Stage Approval if Manager is same as Role Owner
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

I have a requirement where I need to skip Role Owner stage approval if Manager is same as Role Owner. However, it is important that if there are 5 roles, and if Manager is same as Role Owner for only one of the roles, then the approval should be skipped for that one role only. Kindly provide ideas on how this can be achieved, by perhaps using BRF+ decision rules. 


Thanks,

entry.title: Bidder Registration Portal in SRM as an ABAPER
entry.content:
Hey buddy!

I am new to SAP, and want to create a Bidder Registration Portal in SRM Module, which takes input from bidders their data like Company name, GST, PAN and many more, and then after clicking submit it get move to a page which takes digital signature as input.

Can anyone give me proper roadmap considering me a complete fresher, it would be very helpful.

Thank you

entry.title: BRf+ - OPD Transition Help Condition Determination
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Have Forms and EDI configured in SAP S4 HANA public cloud, but the Form should be troiggered for few customers and for others it should be EDI.

but in the OPD we dont have options only one option is Customer Grpup which is being alread used and we cant use the same in OPD.

Need guidance in this case how to proceed further.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: where to download the business rule for output parameter determination - Defect overview print
entry.content:
While printing the defect got a issue and it mentioned to maintain the OPD

Checked some configs in SIMG - Cross-Application Components- Output Control - Define Output Types
SIMG - Cross-Application Components- Output Control - Assign Output Channels
Tried the tcode OPD to create output parameter determination for QM_DEFECT overview. But no business rule for qm defect has been displayed.
Tried BRF+ tcode and add the business rule changed the used mode to expert using the settings.

Tried importing XML. but dont have the file.

Here stuck. which XML file need to be uploaded. The file from Output Management Form template?

entry.title: Output using BRF+ for order confirmation
entry.content:
Output management in SAP S/4HANA governs the generation and distribution of business
documents, such as order confirmations, invoices, and delivery notes. With the advent of
S/4HANA, SAP introduced a new framework for output management leveraging the
Business Rule Framework Plus (BRF+), replacing the traditional NACE-based approach.
This new mechanism provides greater flexibility, improved user experience, and better
integration capabilities. Below is a comprehensive guide to configuring output
management for order confirmation using BRF+.
This documents provides a step by step guide to setup output using BRF+ for order
confirmation.
Step 1: Activate S/4HANA Output Management
Ensure that the output management functionality is activated in the system. This is done by
verifying the system configuration in SPRO:
Path: SPRO > Cross-Application Components > Output Control > Activate Output
Management.
Step 2: Define Output Types
Navigate to the relevant configuration to define output types for sales documents:
Path: SPRO > > Cross-Application Components > Output Control > Define Output Types.

Copy the standard and create new output

3: Assign output channels
Path: SPRO > > Cross-Application Components > Output Control > Assign Output
ChannelsCopyOUTPUT)

Step 4: Define Rules for Determination of Master Form Template
Path: SPRO > > Cross-Application Components > Output Control > Define Rules for
Determination

Click on new entries
And enter the details as below

Step 5: Assign Form Templates
Path: SPRO > > Cross-Application Components > Output Control > Assign Form
Tem

Organization ID = company code Org
unit Type = Sales Org (VKORG) Org
Unit ID= SAGR (Sales org)

Click on new entries and enter the below

Form Template: SD_SLS_ORDER_CONFIRM (Standard)
Step 6: Define Business rules for output Parameter determination
Path: SPRO > > Cross-Application Components > Output Control > Define Business rules
for Output Upon clicking on it new web page will be opened

Parameter determination Step1:
Determination

Click on Edit and add new

Sales Org 

Document Category C

Sales Order Type

Dispatch Time: 1 Immediate
Upon entering all the details, click on activate

Parameter determination Step2:
Determination Step: Receiver

Click on Edit and new entries
New row will be populated. Enter the valuesRole=o/p

Upon entering the details, click on activate

Output Parameter determination Step3: Determination
Step: Channel
Click & edit and new entries

No role is needed as we gave AG in Receiver

Upon entering the details click on activate

Output Parameter determination Step 4: Determination
step: printer settings

Click on edit and new entries 

Number of copies=1

Upon entering the details, click on activate

Output Parameters determination step 5:
Determination Step: Form Template 

Click on edit and click on ‘+’ new entries 

Upon entering all the detail like

Output type, Form template CLICK ON ACTIVATE

Output Parameters determination step 6:
Determination Step: Output Relevance 

Click on edit and click on ‘+’ add new entries. New row will be populated and add the
required entries

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud – Is it possible to add a 4th Receiver Role in Billing Document Output
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are working on Billing Document Output Management in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using BRF+ (Manage Output Determination Apps).

In Receiver determination (DT_RECEIVER), the system allows only the following standard roles for Billing Document:

  • RE (Bill-to Party)

  • AG (Sold-to Party)

  • RG (Payer)

Our business requirement is to print 4 copies of the Billing Invoice (Original, Duplicate, Triplicate, and Extra Copy).

We checked if an additional receiver role (for example, a 4th role or custom role) can be added in Output Management, but Public Cloud does not seem to support custom partner roles.

Question:

  • Is it technically possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud to add a 4th receiver role for Billing Document output determination?

  • If not, is the only supported approach to handle multiple invoice copies inside a single Adobe Form?

Any official confirmation or SAP note reference would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: BRF+ rule table download - upload - GRC12 - SP25
entry.content:
Currently in our GRC12 system in we are using "ZGRAC_INITIATOR" as BRF+ rule table to take decision on which access request GRC should raise based on certain criteria i.e. new account, change account, transfer or lock account.

Now for some reason we have to update this ZGRAC_INITIATOR BRF+ table but while updating this table in DEV GRC system I found that one my colleague who was working in this project he did update the same table in 2020 and created one transport request which he did not moved further to production. So whatever changes he made those changes are still available in DEV only.

Now when I am doing my changes in DEV GRC system in the same table it is oblivious that it will also take the other changes which was done previously made in 2020.

I do not want to take those old changes as I am not aware what he did at that time.

can you please provide some guidance how we can move further in this case.

Is there any possibility that we can download current rule table from production or quality system and upload it in Dev system and then I will make my changes so that it will not impact the system.

If you have any other option, then please suggest.

Thanks 
Ravi Desai

#GRC12 #BRF+ #GRC #AccessControl

entry.title: How to maintain decision table in BRF+ for business user
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have create a BRF+ onject where I have used BRF+ decision table.

What is options available to maintan decision table without opening BRF+ tool? 

I need some help on this.

Thanks

entry.title: How can I export BRF+ decision table data to AWS
entry.content:
I have a requirement to extract BRF+ decision table data to AWS for Analysis.

Is this possible and if so, how can I go about it

entry.title: Does Output Management support local printing?
entry.content:
With NAST, if a LOCL printer is specified on the user master record, it calls the Windows printer dialog for the user to choose his local printer. I am unable to get the same functionality with Output Management (S/4 on premise). The printer gets picked up from OPD and the SU01 printer is disregarded. Is this functionality not supported by Output Management?

If so, then I am stumped. I have a Fiori app that only works with Output Management. Surely 100 users in 100 locations cannot be forced to spool to just one printer defined in OPD?

entry.title: Remove Objects in ATC scans
entry.content:
We want to exclude objects during normal ATC scans. Although a BAdI supports this, it works only during release. As a result, we face challenges when changing the CD status in CHARM, as this re‑initiates the ATC scan and reports messages for the skipped objects.

Example : BRF+ generated function module (Z*) but does not follow naming convention for program variables and signature.  So exemption needs tobe requested for them everytime.

entry.title: Hello, I want to translate SD_SLS_DEFAULT_EMAIL_TEMPLATE text into French language on HANA On Prem.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working in S/4HANA Output Parameter Determination (OPD) for Sales Documents, where the email template SD_SLS_DEFAULT_EMAIL_TEMPLATE is assigned under Email Settings.

My requirement is to translate the email subject/body text of this standard template into French.

Current situation:

  • I can see SD_SLS_DEFAULT_EMAIL_TEMPLATE in OPD decision table

  • The “Maintain Email Templates” Fiori tile is not activated in my system

  • In OPD, I only see the template assignment, not the actual email content

  • I am not sure where the template text/content is maintained for translation (BRF+, SSCUI, SE63, or another app)

My questions:

  1. Where can I find and maintain the actual content (subject/body) of SD_SLS_DEFAULT_EMAIL_TEMPLATE?

  2. How can I create or maintain a French (FR) translation for this template?

  3. Is this maintained in BRF+, standard email template repository, or another configuration path?

  4. Are there any standard SAP apps / transactions / SSCUI paths for translating this template when the email template tile is unavailable?

Any guidance on the correct navigation path or best practice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: BRF+ Interview FAQ's
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me with BRF+FAQ's during interviews?

I have one in next 3-4 days.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: BRF+ Application screen issues
entry.content:
Hi,

When i right click on my BRF+ application , I cannot see the context menu when I right click on left  :

2) PoP-UP showing blank information. Also when I try to close  its not closing when i click on 'X'.

 

 

Please suggest

entry.title: Create an email after F111 with BRF plus
entry.content:
Dear all,

I try to create automatic mails and attachments after automatic and manual payment runs (F110 and F111 Free Form)  with BRF+. 

The creation was successful for the automatic payments via BRF output type "payment list", but I think I am missing the output type or the basic definition to do the same for free form payments. 

Can you please check if this is possible?

 

Thanks in advance,

Nadine
